productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Check Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition White, navy blue and red plaid check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides that have mock snap button flaps as design detail, welt pockets on the back with snap button flaps, patch pockets on the thighs with buttoned flaps, comfortable waistband with loops and drawstring on the inside, drawstring on the leg hems, black stitch detailing, and a button and zipper closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Plaid checks in white, navy blue and red gives a vacation vibe to these shorts from status quo. The insert pockets on the sides, the patch pockets on the sides and black stitch detailing gives an edge to these utilitarian additions. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team these with t-shirts in solid colours. Model statistics The model wears shorts of length 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
